domain_description: Streamlined redox flow battery domain for JSON extraction and hypergraph construction.
domain_context: You are an expert in redox flow battery (RFB) research, including vanadium redox flow batteries, iron-chromium redox flow batteries, zinc-bromine systems, aqueous organic flow batteries, membranes, electrodes, electrolytes, additives, degradation mechanisms, and battery testing protocols. Extract structured knowledge from RFB literature. Follow the ontology, rules, and output format exactly.

entity_types.name: ACTIVE_SPECIES
entity_types.description: Redox-active molecules or ions, redox couples, supporting electrolytes, additives, solvents, salt reagents.

entity_types.name: MEMBRANE
entity_types.description: Ion-exchange membranes, porous separators, blends, and membrane modifications.

entity_types.name: ELECTRODE
entity_types.description: Electrodes, bipolar plates, current collectors, catalysts and every named modified electrode state.

entity_types.name: METRIC
entity_types.description: Cell-level performance indicators or intrinsic material characterization.

entity_types.name: SYSTEM
entity_types.description: Physical devices, equipment, cells, stacks, tanks, pumps, and test systems.

relation_types.name: COMPOSITION
relation_types.description: A is a component, precursor, product, additive, dopant, solvent, or modification of B.

relation_types.name: OPERATION
relation_types.description: A and B are co-present in the same experimental setup, operating condition, or performance measurement.

relation_types.name: DEGRADATION
relation_types.description: A causes, mitigates, indicates, explains, or suffers B.

relation_types.name: COMPARISON
relation_types.description: A and B are compared under a shared criterion, metric, condition, or application target.

critical_rules: Extract exact chemical species and redox couples when mentioned.
Chemical identity precision: metal, ion, redox couple, salt, additive, and solvent are separate entities.
Derived electrode names are separate entities.
Numeric values must be split into value/unit fields.
Preserve original names; do not translate or canonicalize entity names.
Relations and hyperedges must use exact entity names from the current K_v list.
